changeSet.author: Manuel
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE public.utm_logstash_filter SET filter_version='3.0.1', updated_at=now(), logstash_filter = $$# Macos filter, version 3.0.1 pipeline: - dataTypes: - macos steps: - json: source: raw
# Renaming useful fields - rename: from: - log.activityidentifier to: log.activityIdentifier
- rename: from: - log.processidentifier to: log.processIdentifier
- rename: from: - log.storecategory to: log.storeCategory
- rename: from: - log.threadidentifier to: log.threadIdentifier
$$ WHERE id=1507;
